assertion_results.text: Each non-documentation task file contains all required template sections
Task count is between 2 and 8 inclusive
Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
Ambiguity is explicitly flagged in the impact map or summary comment
Tasks do not include 'Better UI' or frontend scope beyond backend changes
The plan labels assumptions as assumptions, not as feature requirements
Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
Impact map lists concrete, specific changes
Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name
Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections
File paths reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest
For each task created, a description digest is produced with format-tagged SHA-256 hash
Priority is inherited (Normal) when set on Feature
No documentation tasks are generated when no Documentation Considerations in feature
